other_observers: John Maynard on the 10th, no one with me on the 9th, but others there later in the day
description: First seen on the 8th in late evening light by Mark Peterson. On the morning of the 9th bird was seen sitting amongst a flock of mostly California Gulls where it was dwarfed.  Dark full cap, without any white feathering towards the base of the bill apparent. Long wings extend well past tail.  Bill blood-red and thin at the base. Black cap extends down almost to gape.  Feet just barely visible while it perched on the bare ground.  In flight, buoyant.  Watched fly to water twice, both time plucking object of the surface of the water, not plunge-diving. In flight tail seemed long.  Trailing edge of primaries with thin dark edge extending to beginning of secondaries. In flight dorsal wing view was of evenly colored light gray.
photographer: Photographer: bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard
